component.name: CD Ripper
component.summary: Audio CD ripper with MusicBrainz tagging

description.p: A no-nonsense audio CD ripper that produces verified FLAC files with MusicBrainz metadata, AccurateRip verification, embedded cover art, and synced lyrics from LRCLib.

ul.li: MusicBrainz disc ID lookup with TOC-fuzzy fallback

description.p: Cross-platform WorkerSession refactor — Mac rip path now works (self_exe_path fixes /proc/self/exe-on-Mac bug); Windows skeleton stubs in place.
Mac full stack: libcdio-based eject + disc-status, .app bundle, .dmg packaging, Sparkle auto-update, Homebrew Cask formula.
Mac native build verified — first time cdripper compiles + runs on macOS.
Flatpak adds Chromaprint (fpcalc) for AcoustID audio fingerprinting fallback.
Flatpak feature-parity: opusenc, lame, rsgain bundled — MP3/Opus profiles and ReplayGain calculation now work in Flatpak.
Flatpak packaging shipping (Wave 0b): cross-distro install works on Fedora + Debian via KDE Platform 6.7 runtime.
